description: Koala identifies the companies behind your website traffic, unifies intent signals, and helps sales teams prioritize and engage high-intent accounts.
tagline: See the companies behind your website traffic
overview: Koala reveals which companies are visiting your site, unifies intent and product signals into one view, and helps reps prioritize high-intent accounts and keep the CRM accurate.
what_is: Koala is a signal and intent tool that helps sales and RevOps teams work the right accounts. It identifies the companies behind website traffic and pulls signals from many sources into a single view, so reps can see who is showing interest and act on it.

It is most useful for sales development and marketing teams that want to prioritize high-intent accounts and build a repeatable pipeline. Setup is quick, and account scoring plus a clear view of the buying committee make outreach more timely and relevant.

Koala integrates with CRMs, email platforms, and data warehouses to automate enrichment and keep records current. It is not a CRM or marketing-automation platform itself; it aggregates intent and helps reps prioritize and engage.
